1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/DEV2DEV-DE/ioBroker.jablotron/blob/master/io-package.json).

3014.issue: [S3014] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3020.issue: [E3020] "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3025.issue: [E3025] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" matrix is missing required node.js version 24. Tests with node.js 24 are required.

3050.issue: [W3050] "test-and-release.yml": could not retrieve log for "check-and-lint" job in [run #386](https://github.com/DEV2DEV-DE/ioBroker.jablotron/actions/runs/21861121979).

3052.issue: [W3052] "test-and-release.yml": could not retrieve log for job "adapter-tests (22.x, windows-latest)" in [run #386](https://github.com/DEV2DEV-DE/ioBroker.jablotron/actions/runs/21861121979).

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5606.issue: [W5606] i18n "admin/i18n" seems to contain untranslated entries identical to English (>5 words). Affected languages: es (1 key, example: labelRead); fr (1 key, example: labelRead); it (1 key, example: labelRead); nl (1 key, example: labelRead); pl (1 key, example: labelRead); pt (1 key, example: labelRead); ru (1 key, example: labelRead); uk (1 key, example: labelRead); zh (1 key, example: labelRead).

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/readThermoDevices" attribute "label" uses key "thermoDevices" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#158] "[iobroker-bot] Add Dependabot Ignore Rule for @types/node Major Version Updates"](https://github.com/DEV2DEV-DE/ioBroker.jablotron/issues/158)

8910.issue: [S8910] File "/.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge.yml.OLD" was found. If it is no longer needed, consider deleting it.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 4.0.0 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/DEV2DEV-DE/ioBroker.jablotron/blob/master/package.json)

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">= 20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/DEV2DEV-DE/ioBroker.jablotron/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/DEV2DEV-DE/ioBroker.jablotron/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/DEV2DEV-DE/ioBroker.jablotron/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0086.issue: [W0086] "@tsconfig/node18" should match the major node.js version from [package.json](https://github.com/DEV2DEV-DE/ioBroker.jablotron/blob/master/package.json) engines.node (>=20). Please update to @tsconfig/node20 at [package.json](https://github.com/DEV2DEV-DE/ioBroker.jablotron/blob/master/package.json).

0090.issue: [W0090] "/tsconfig.json" should be adjusted to match "@tsconfig/node20" (for example: "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json").
